The property contains several dead and severely deteriorated trees that present a safety hazard. Many of these trees have no living canopy, exhibit extensive dead limbs, and show signs of decay and structural instability. During the summer months, dense kudzu growth completely covers many of the trees, making it difficult to inspect their condition and adding significant weight that increases the likelihood of limb or whole-tree failure.Reason for Removal:Dying tree
